meta.title: Cyber Risk Ratings From Moodys' Company
meta.description: Dale Peterson interviews Derek Vadala of Cyber Assessments (a joint venture of Moodys and Team8) in the S4x20 Green Room. This new company is developing a cyber risk rating for companies that will be used in similar ways to Moodys' credit risk rating.
